zh.lifeSummary: Walter Espec是William Espec的兒子，於1068年出生在英國貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登。他和Adeline de Beauchamp至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1153年3月7日在英國越可爾利也瓦利享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾利也瓦利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Espec是William Espec的儿子，于1068年出生在英国貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登。他和Adeline de Beauchamp至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1153年3月7日在英国越可爾利也瓦利享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾利也瓦利。

nameMeanings.name: Espec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: most likely a topographic name for someone who lived by or owned an area of pasture, derived from Middle High German esban, espan ‘pasture’ (Bavarian and Swabian Espan).
North German and Danish: from a variant of the personal name Jesper, Danish and Low German form of Kasper and Kaspar , equivalents of Casper .

variants.name: Esber
meanings: Arabic (Syria and Lebanon): from Asbir, of unknown meaning, used as a surname. Derivation from Arabic aṣbar ‘very patient’ is linguistically improbable (ṣ and s are not interchangeable). This surname is found among both Muslims and Christians. Compare Esper 4 and Asper 2.

variants.name: Kasper
meanings: German, Danish, and Polish; Slovak (mainly Kašper); Czech and Slovenian (also Kašper): from the personal names Kasper (German, Danish, and Polish) and Kašper (Slovak, Czech, and Slovenian variant of Gašpar, Kašpar, and Gašper, respectively), equivalents of Casper . In North America, this surname is also a shortened and altered form of especially Polish patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Kasprzak . See also Kaspar , Gaspar , and Gasper .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Walter Espec was born in 1068, in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England as the son of William Espec. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Adeline de Beauchamp. He died on 7 March 1153, in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Espec est né en 1068, à Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, fils de William Espec. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Adeline de Beauchamp. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1153, à Rievaulx, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Rievaulx, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Espec wurde 1068 in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England, als Sohn von William Espec geboren. Er hatte mit Adeline de Beauchamp mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. März 1153 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Espec è nato il nel 1068 nel Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England come figlio di William Espec. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Adeline de Beauchamp. Morì il 7 marzo 1153, nel Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Especは1068年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオルド ワーデンでWilliam Especの息子として生まれた。彼はAdeline de Beauchampとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1153年3月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーヴァウルックスで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーヴァウルックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Espec(은)는 1068년 영국 베드퍼드실르 드 워든에서 William Espec의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Adeline de Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 3월 7일 영국 요르크실르 리에바에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리에바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter Espec nasceu em 1068, em Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra filho de William Espec. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Adeline de Beauchamp. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1153, em Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Espec родился в 1068 г. в местности олд варден, бедфордшир, Англия. Его отца звали William Espec. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Adeline de Beauchamp. Он умер 7 марта 1153 г. в местности риеваулкс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности риеваулкс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Walter Espec nació en 1068, en Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de William Espec. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Adeline de Beauchamp. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1153, en Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
